decisions_seed.title: Plugin registry default set
decisions_seed.content: PluginRegistry.createWithDefaults wires every shipped language and framework plugin so callers do not have to enumerate them manually.

decisions_seed.title: Use neverthrow Result envelope
decisions_seed.content: Return ok/err Result everywhere instead of throwing.

decisions_seed.title: WAL checkpoint policy
decisions_seed.content: Run wal_checkpoint TRUNCATE on a 30-second timer.

notes: Verifies query_decisions tag filtering still narrows the corpus to the right slice. Regression here means decisions can no longer be retrieved via their tags.
